message:
fix(agentmail,tracker): improve project validation and deletion detection

- agentmail/session.go: Add strict project key validation to prevent
  legacy fallback from returning agent for wrong project
- tracker/tracker.go: Verify file is actually deleted before reporting
  deletion change (handle git clean files missing from snapshot)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
